result.stdout:
Description:
  nh-tool - NHibernate Mapping-by-Code scaffolder from database schema

Usage:
  nh-tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  nh-scaffold <connection-string> <provider>  Scaffold NHibernate entities and mappings from a database

commands.payload:
Description:
  nh-tool - NHibernate Mapping-by-Code scaffolder from database schema

Usage:
  nh-tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  nh-scaffold <connection-string> <provider>  Scaffold NHibernate entities and mappings from a database

result.stdout:
Description:
  Scaffold NHibernate entities and mappings from a database

Usage:
  nh-tool nh-scaffold <connection-string> <provider> [options]

Arguments:
  <connection-string>  The database connection string
  <provider>           Database provider: oracle | sqlserver

Options:
  -o, --output <output>        Output directory for generated files [default: ./Generated]
  -n, --namespace <namespace>  Root namespace for generated classes [default: MyApp.Data]
  -s, --schema <schema>        Schema/owner filter (e.g. dbo, HR). Defaults to provider default.
  -t, --tables <tables>        Comma-separated list of tables to scaffold (e.g. USERS,ORDERS,ORDER_ITEMS). If omitted, all tables are scaffolded.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

  -s, --schema <schema>        Schema/owner filter (e.g. dbo, HR). Defaults to provider default.
  -t, --tables <tables>        Comma-separated list of tables to scaffold (e.g. USERS,ORDERS,ORDER_ITEMS). If omitted, all tables are scaffolded.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
